# add --depends-on: set depends_on at creation; validate targets
mkdir proj
cd proj
exec mtt init
stdout 'initialized'

exec mtt add --type epic 'E'
stdout 'created e1'
exec mtt add --type epic 'A'
stdout 'created e2'

# create B depending on e2
exec mtt add --type epic --depends-on e2 'B'
stdout 'created e3'
exec mtt dep list e3
stdout 'e3 depends on:'
stdout '  e2  epic  \[tbd\]  A'

# a missing target is rejected and no task is created
! exec mtt add --type epic --depends-on e99 'C'
stderr 'not found'
exec mtt list
! stdout 'created e4'
! stdout '  C'
